titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ibrahim Ibn Umar
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ibrahim Ibn Umar

segments: ه عن إبراهيم بن عمر فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن حمّاد بن عيسى، عن إبراهيم بن عمر اليمانيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن إبراهيم بن عمر فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن حمّاد بن عيسى، عن إبراهيم بن عمر اليمانيّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ibrahim ibn Umar has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Yaqub ibn Yazid, from Hammad ibn Isa, from Ibrahim ibn Umar Al-Yamani.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ibrahim ibn Umar has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Yaqub ibn Yazid, from Hammad ibn Isa, from Ibrahim ibn Umar Al-Yamani.
